demo.name: Bandage
description: A rough scrap of cloth soaked in seawater.
comment: This rag will keep you from bleeding out.
Appreciate the effort - and try not to die before the next port.

demo.name: Minor Healing Potion
description: Quickly mends small cuts and dulls the pain, giving you strength to fight... or flee.
comment: Bed rest and peace and quiet are just as necessary for healing.

demo.name: Great Healing Potion
description: Restores your strength and heals even the deepest wounds.
comment: They say this mixture hauls sailors straight out of Davy Jones' locker.
